title: Login page not loading
description: User unable to access login page after recent update.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: System not accepting image files larger than 2MB.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales report numbers not matching database records.

title: Email notifications not sending
description: Users not receiving password reset emails.

title: Slow page loading speed
description: Homepage taking more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Incorrect password validation
description: System accepting weak passwords without validation.

title: Mobile view layout broken
description: UI elements overlapping in mobile responsive mode.

title: Search function not working
description: No results showing even for valid keywords.

title: Database connection timeout
description: Frequent timeout errors when accessing database.

title: File download issue
description: Users unable to download PDF reports.

title: Session expires too quickly
description: Users logged out automatically within 5 minutes.

title: Incorrect invoice calculation
description: Tax calculation error in invoice summary.

title: API returning 500 error
description: Internal server error when fetching user data.
